CPCM-X
======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which CPCM-X installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using CPCM-X, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load CPCM-X/1.1.0-gfbf-2023b
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
